title: Poweka Strimmer Spool Compatible with Bosch ART 24 27 30 30-36, 4packs of Cutting Spool Replace Strimmer line, 1.6mm 6m Spools & Line
features: 【Compatibility】These replacement spool lines can be used to fix various types of lawnmowers, compatible with Bosch ART24 ART24+ ART27 ART27+ ART30 ART30 ART30-36.
【Autofeed Spool】This kind of spools uses pre-wound cutting line, and will deliver trimming thread automatically when needed, it can keep the trimmer stable when using.
【Good Material】With solid spool and flexible nylon thread, mowing will become more efficient.
【Easy Assemble】You can replace the spool without additional tools, you just need to remove the old one and adjust our product in the right place.

【Using Precaution】 It has strong centrifugal force an【Using Precaution】 It has strong centrifugal force and cutting fast during using, please wear eye protection and long pants to avoid unnecessary injury. pants to avoid unnecessary injury.
description: Package includes: 4pcs of replacement spools. Notes: “Cutting Spool Line Compatible with Bosch.”These spools are not sold or created by Bosch.
